items.title: Summer Hawks beats Brooklyn 83-76 despite a very meh evening from lotto pick Kingston Flemings. Good minutes from Zuby Ejiofor, a poster dunk from Henri Veesaar and some solid play from the G Leaguers.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Summer Hawks beats Brooklyn 83-76 despite a very meh evening from lotto pick Kingston Flemings. Good minutes from Zuby Ejiofor, a poster dunk from Henri Veesaar and some solid play from the G Leaguers. 

Nets shot 2-of-24 from 3. YIKES!!

items.title: Summer Hawks crush Spurs 93-66. Quiet game for lotto pick Kingston Flemings but he orchestrated things -- 5 pts 8 ast 2 TO in 19 minutes. 15 for Asa Newell, 14 for Henri Veesaar.

items.body_excerpt: Summer Hawks crush Spurs 93-66. Quiet game for lotto pick Kingston Flemings but he orchestrated things -- 5 pts 8 ast 2 TO in 19 minutes. 15 for Asa Newell, 14 for Henri Veesaar.

items.title: The Hawks have quite an impressive "second unit" at Summer League when you're looking at RayJ Dennis, Keshon Gilbert, Kobe Johnson, Jacob Toppin, and Henri Veesaar coming off the bench.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks have quite an impressive "second unit" at Summer League when you're looking at RayJ Dennis, Keshon Gilbert, Kobe Johnson, Jacob Toppin, and Henri Veesaar coming off the bench.

All 5 of those guys have either played in the NBA before or might soon.

items.title: Full details on Henri Veesaar’s Hawks contract…
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Full details on Henri Veesaar’s Hawks contract…

4-year deal using 2nd round exception

Starts at rookie minimum (roughly $1.35 million) in 1st year

First 2 years fully guaranteed.

3rd and 4th years non-guaranteed.

4th year is team option.

Total value is north of $9 million.

items.title: The Atlanta Hawks signed Henri Veesaar to a four-year, $9.3 million deal, which includes the first two years fully guaranteed and the final two years non-guaranteed, league sources told HoopsHype. Veesaar, the 52nd pick in the 2026 NBA Draft, was acquired by Atlanta in a trade.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Atlanta Hawks signed Henri Veesaar to a four-year, $9.3 million deal, which includes the first two years fully guaranteed and the final two years non-guaranteed, league sources told HoopsHype. Veesaar, the 52nd pick in the 2026 NBA Draft, was acquired by Atlanta in a trade.

items.title: The Hawks have signed No. 23 pick Zuby Ejiofor and No. 52 pick Henri Veesaar.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks have signed No. 23 pick Zuby Ejiofor and No. 52 pick Henri Veesaar.

Ejiofor is his rookie-scale deal for that draft slot.

Of note, Veesaar is NOT a Two-Way deal. It’s a standard contract.

(Flemings to come, maybe as soon as today)

Hawks now have 16 contracts.

items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
i love the veesaar pick/move but i can also say this easily with a laugh…

it’s deeply funny that there is mass celebration about the hawks simply adding a 7-footer (any 7-footer at all!!) when he is notably worse defensively than the 6’8 big they drafted the previous day

items.title: FWIW -- I had Henri Veesaar in the same tier as Zuby Ejiofor and would've thought it was a totally reasonable pick at No. 23 last night.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
FWIW -- I had Henri Veesaar in the same tier as Zuby Ejiofor and would've thought it was a totally reasonable pick at No. 23 last night.

Surprisingly falls all the way into the 50's and the Hawks get a tremendous value.

ATL also values 5-out spacing and he can provide that at center.

items.title: Caaa-Caw!!! I had Veesaar 26th. Bizarre that he slid so far.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Caaa-Caw!!! I had Veesaar 26th. Bizarre that he slid so far.
